thoughts_kody_pipeline_471534669581.content: The 'approve' stage does not exist in the default kody.config schema — it must be explicitly added to both the config and as a .kody/steps/approve.md file

facts_kody_github_integration_4715365043.content: kody.config.json stores github.owner and github.repo explicitly; these must match the target repo for gh CLI calls to work correctly

facts_kody_github_integration_4715378888.content: gh CLI is available and can be used within Kody pipeline stages to verify GitHub API state such as issue open/closed status
